question: Based on the chart, which statement about rainfall (mm) over this 14‑day period is most accurate when comparing the first 7 days to the last 7 days?

options.A: Total rainfall was higher in the first 7 days than in the last 7 days.
options.B: Total rainfall was higher in the last 7 days than in the first 7 days.
options.C: Total rainfall was roughly equal between the first 7 days and the last 7 days.
options.D: There was no rainfall during at least one of the 14 days.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
